notes: Excellent comprehensive analysis. Agent correctly parsed 1221 PAM failures + 1638 FTP connections + 23 klogind events (2882 total, meeting 2000+ requirement). All sections completed: service breakdown, top-10 sources, targeted users (root 68.8%), temporal analysis (peak 07:00 with 154 failures), FTP/SSH pattern comparison, and 16-point prioritized recommendations. Report is well-structured markdown with tables, ASCII histograms, and sample events. Minor deductions: (1) two identical report files created (duplication), (2) Python analysis script included adds minor verbosity to deliverables (not explicitly requested), (3) actual event counts differ slightly from expected baseline but well within acceptable variation. Overall execution is thorough and professional.
